# btpservice_cicd_trigger (Data Source)

Reads a single trigger for a CI/CD job in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the trigger.
- `job` (String) Name or ID of the CI/CD job that owns this trigger.

### Read-Only

- `timer` (Attributes) Timer schedule configuration. Present when `type` is `timer`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timer))
- `type` (String) Trigger type (e.g. `timer`).

<a id="nestedatt--timer"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timer`

Read-Only:

- `branch` (String) Branch to build on the timer schedule.
- `cron` (String) Cron expression defining the timer schedule.
